channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Celebrating First Nations dance pioneer Michael Leslie's legacy
item.description: Beyond the Tracks is an autobiographical performance that chronicles the life and artistic contributions of Kamilaroi/Mandandanji dancer, choreographer, and cultural leader Michael Leslie. The show bl...

item.title: Moroccan Cookbook Features Honey-Buttered Pancakes and Other Dishes
item.description: The article highlights Nargisse Benkabbou's second cookbook, 'Madaq,' which celebrates Moroccan cuisine through accessible recipes. Benkabbou, a London-based chef of Moroccan heritage, emphasizes the ...

item.title: Ruto's Daughter Graduates from Dubai University as Deputy Governor Grieves Over Lost Sons
item.description: The article covers multiple stories. First, President William Ruto's daughter, Cullie, recently graduated with a Bachelor of Arts in Interior Architecture and Design from Heriot-Watt University Dubai....

item.title: Typhoon Inday's Impact on Southwest Monsoon Persists Despite Exiting PAR
item.description: Typhoon Inday (Bavi) has exited the Philippine Area of Responsibility (PAR) but continues to influence the southwest monsoon, leading to persistent heavy rainfall and strong winds across multiple regi...

item.title: At least 17 dead in Mindanao due to enhanced southwest monsoon and typhoon
item.description: The National Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council (NDRRMC) reported at least 17 deaths caused by the enhanced southwest monsoon (habagat), intensified by Typhoon Inday (Bavi). The disaster p...

item.title: Nigeria Conducts Successful Rescue of Abducted Schoolchildren and Teachers in Oyo
item.description: Security forces in Nigeria's Oyo state have successfully rescued 39 schoolchildren and six teachers who were kidnapped by gunmen nearly two months ago. The abduction occurred on May 15 when armed assa...

item.title: Lagos residents navigate flood chaos: livelihoods lost, resilience found
item.description: Floods in Lagos have left a trail of destruction, wiping out homes, businesses, and livelihoods. While many families face the harsh reality of losing everything, others have turned to the crisis as an...

item.title: Afghan National Extradited to Face US Narcotics Charges
item.description: Abdul Zahir Qadeer, an Afghan national, has been extradited from Kenya to face narcotics charges in the United States following an Interpol Red Notice. The extradition process, concluded on July 9, 20...

item.title: Tanzania aims for Sh2trn in non-tax revenue from state assets
item.description: The Office of the Treasury Registrar (OTR) has set an ambitious target of 2 trillion shillings in non-tax revenue for the 2026/27 financial year, surpassing the government's projection of 1.79 trillio...

item.title: Newmarket's Chief Positivity Officer Boosts Community Morale During Pandemic
item.description: Jamie Boyle, a longtime customer service supervisor in Newmarket, Ontario, was appointed as the town's chief positivity officer during the COVID-19 pandemic. His role involved fostering optimism and m...

item.title: Trump Threatens Military Action Against Iran Over Assassination Risk
item.description: President Donald Trump has warned that Iran would face massive military retaliation if it attempted to assassinate him, stating the US military is prepared to launch a devastating response. This threa...

item.title: Pakistan-US trade talks yield progress on tariff reductions and economic cooperation
item.description: Pakistan and the United States have made notable advancements in negotiations for a reciprocal trade agreement, according to the Foreign Office spokesperson. The two-day talks in Washington DC, led by...

item.title: Trump Threatens Iran with Missiles Amid Escalating US-Iran Tensions
item.description: US President Donald Trump has warned that the country has missiles aimed at Iran, with thousands more ready, if Tehran attempts to assassinate him. This comes after mourners at Ayatollah Ali Khamenei'...

item.title: Potential Bank Holiday Debate Following England's World Cup Victory
item.description: The article discusses the debate surrounding whether England should receive a national bank holiday in the event of winning the FIFA World Cup. Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has hinted at granting a...

item.title: Prince Harry's UK Visit Marked by Media Struggles and Court Defeat
item.description: Prince Harry's recent visit to the UK has been overshadowed by a series of media challenges and legal setbacks, according to the BBC article. The trip, intended to highlight his Invictus Games initiat...

item.title: Suspect in UK Family Murders Arrested in Johannesburg
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, wanted by UK authorities for the murder of his wife and two daughters in Bedford, was arrested in Johannesburg after a joint operation involving South African Police Service ...

item.title: Typhoon Bavi Causes Widespread Evacuations Across China, Japan, and Taiwan
item.description: A powerful typhoon named Bavi has prompted the evacuation of over 600,000 people in China as it moves toward the eastern city of Wenzhou. The storm, which first hit Japan's southern Sakishima islands ...

item.title: Housing Bill Becomes Law Without Trump's Signature as Congress' Last Major Ceremony Fails
item.description: The housing bill, which passed without President Donald Trump’s signature, marks a significant moment in legislative history. Despite meticulous preparations—including American flags lining Statuary H...

item.title: IMF Approves USD 443.9 Million for Tanzania, Supporting 6.2% GDP Growth
item.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has approved a USD 443.9 million disbursement to Tanzania, part of a broader financial support package under the Extended Credit Facility (ECF) and Resilience and...

item.title: Blue Bolt defeats Precise in thrilling Falmouth Stakes victory
item.description: In a highly anticipated race at the Falmouth Stakes, Blue Bolt emerged victorious over the odds-on favorite Precise, securing a dramatic win for trainer Andrew Balding. The Group One contest saw Blue ...
